results.title: El Nino Warning, Rising Wholesale Prices, Falling Rupee, Finance Ministry Raises Inflation Risks, Check
results.description: India’s inflation outlook has come under fresh scrutiny as the Finance Ministry highlighted several emerging risks, including El Nino weather conditions, rising wholesale prices, and a weakening rupee. These factors could potentially increase price pressures and impact the overall economy in the coming months.
